# ciscosecureaccess_site (Resource)

Manages a Site in the Cisco Secure Access organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ciscosecureaccess_site" "example" {
  name = "my-site"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Site. Must be between 1 and 255 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Unique ID of the Site.
- `internal_network_count` (Number) Number of internal networks associated with the Site.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Specifies whether the Site is the default Site.
- `origin_id` (Number) Origin ID of the Site.
- `type` (String) Type of the Site.
- `va_count` (Number) Number of virtual appliances associated with the Site.
